resources.string: SD Maid SE Pro inikeza imiphumela engcono, izici eziningi kanye nezinketho zabasebenzisi abaphezulu.

SD Maid ayikwazi ukuxhuma ku-Google Play. Ingabe Google Play ifakiwe futhi isesikhathini? Ingabe i-akhawunti yakho ye-Google ingene? Zama ukusula i-cache yohlelo lokusebenza lwe-Google Play futhi uphinde uqalise idivayisi yakho.
Kube nenkinga nge-Google Play. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva noma uphinde uqalise idivayisi yakho.\n\nImininingwane: %s

Kwenzeke iphutha langaphakathi le-Google Play. Sicela uzame okulandelayo:

• Phinda uqalise idivayisi yakho
• Sula i-cache ye-Google Play Store
• Zama futhi kamuva
Ayikwazi ukuxhuma ku-Google Play. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumeka kwe-inthanethi yakho bese uzama futhi.
Sebenzisa inketho ethi \"Buyisela ukuthenga\" ukuze ubuyisele ukuthenga kwakho. Uma inkinga iqhubeka, zama ukusula i-cache ye-Google Play uphinde uqalise idivayisi yakho.
SD Maid ayinayo izikhangiso futhi ayithengisi idatha yabasebenzisi. Umsebenzi wami uxhaswa nguwe ❤️.

• Ukuhlanza uhlelo lokusebenza 💯
• Imisebenzi ehlelelwe ngokulandelana ⏰
• Izinketho ezengeziwe kuwo wonke amathuluzi ⚙️
• Imithetho yakho yokususa ✍️
• Umthuthukisi ogqugquzelayo 🧙
nokunye…

Ungakhetha phakathi kokuthenga kube kanye kanye nesikhathi sokubhalisela sonyaka esishibhile.\nUkubhalisela kuqala ngesikhathi sokuhlola sezinsuku eziyi-14 samahhala, ngemva kwalokho uzokhokhiswa kanye ngonyaka. Ukuhlola nokubhalisela kungacishwa nganoma yisiphi isikhathi.\nIzici ezifanayo, kuphela amamodeli ezintengo ahlukene.
Ukuthuthukiswa kwakho kusebenza emadivayisini ane-akhawunti efanayo ye-Google.
Ukuvumelanisa kwe-Play Store kungathatha isikhathi. Zama ukuphinde uqalise, ukusula i-cache ye-Google Play noma ulinde nje.
Ama-akhawunti amaningi angadunga i-Google Play. Phuma kwamanye ama-akhawunti noma ufake ngewebhusayithi ye-Google Play, ephoqa ukuhlobanisa ne-akhawunti ethile.
